model.objectives: place all 276 parts into the single 1500x6000 stock; minimize remaining area / unplaced count

run_b.reason: Q43b spec is single-run only (max 1200s); user requested only one Run A

notes: Q43b is an OWN solver (vrs_solver) run, not upstream Sparrow. The Q43 upstream SPP baseline (separate audit) is the comparison reference for upstream parity.

Single finite stock 1500x6000 — the area is comparable to upstream SPP 1500x6000 (9.0 m^2 each), but the objective (placement-density vs minimize-width) and inventory model (finite stock vs single strip) differ.
Continuous rotation effective: 184 unique angles, 189 non-orthogonal placements (vs 16 / 140 in Q43 upstream SPP, which was deliberately limited to a 16-bin orientation list per item).

Result is partial: 218/276 placed. The 58 unplaced parts are due to the Q40/Q41 margin=5/spacing=8 geometry expansion, which reduces the effective container area below what the upstream SPP baseline saw with raw polygon sizes.
